name: allium sativum
title: allium sativum benefits
description: Allium sativum kills viruses by exerting antiviral activity, which is the ability to inhibit or destroy viruses. This benefit is crucial as viruses are responsible for numerous diseases, such as influenza, HIV, and herpes, which can lead to severe health complications and even death. The antiviral properties of Allium sativum are attributed to its bioactive constituents, including allicin, quercetin, and kaempferol, which have been shown to have potent antiviral and anti-inflammatory e...
